prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~22.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 83.8 kg; Height 168.5 cm; BMI 29.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.1%; 9 months ago 7.2%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 187mg/dL; 9 months ago 146mg/dL; 6 months ago 157mg/dL; 3 months ago 204mg/dL; current 170mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 82.8kg; 9 months ago 82.9kg; 6 months ago 84.2kg; 3 months ago 81.8kg; current 83.8kg), Height (12 months ago 168.5cm; 9 months ago 168.5cm; 6 months ago 168.5cm; 3 months ago 168.5cm; current 168.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 9.0U/L; 3 months ago 9.0U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 11U/L; 9 months ago 11U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 14U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.3mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; current 40mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 158mg/g; 9 months ago 242mg/g; 6 months ago 244mg/g; 3 months ago 209mg/g; current 261mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 77mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 138mg/dL; 9 months ago 153mg/dL; 6 months ago 132mg/dL; 3 months ago 152mg/dL; current 144mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
